trivia_bullets.text: Snowhorn Rider is a Temur watermark common from Khans of Tarkir (September 2014). The Temur Frontier are arctic survivalists whose signature mechanic Ferocious rewards controlling a creature with power 4 or greater.
sources: Wizards of the Coast: Mechanics of Khans of Tarkir

trivia_bullets.text: A 5/5 with Trample for six mana, Snowhorn Rider is a Ferocious ENABLER, not a Ferocious card — its stat line satisfies the power-4+ threshold for other Temur spells. Morph cost equals its face-up cost, making the morph a bluffing tool rather than a mana-efficiency play. Never reprinted — KTK first printing is the only one.

Flavor text: 'Sure-footed, strong-willed, and ill-tempered — and so is the ram.' A double-subject joke: the first clause describes the rider; 'and so is the ram' pivots to the snowhorn mount. The 'ram' is the snowhorn beast native to Tarkir's arctic Temur territories, not a literal ram.
EDHREC rank 29,319 — well into obscure territory for Commander. Pauper-legal per Scryfall but sees no meaningful play. Carried near-zero competitive footprint in KTK limited at six mana.

related_cards.name: Trail of Mystery
related_cards.note: Temur morph-ramp enchantment; what large morph creatures like this were paired with

related_cards.name: Savage Punch
related_cards.note: Common Temur fight spell with Ferocious upgrade; Snowhorn Rider's 5 power enables the bonus

flags: TEMUR FEROCIOUS COHORT WATCH: Snowhorn Rider is a Temur-watermark Ferocious enabler (5/5 body meets power-4+ threshold). Flag for Temur Ferocious cohort watch-list per dispatch instructions.
